DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff filed a Notice of Withdrawal of Action and Notice of Bankruptcy Filing on January 6, 2014. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs HSBC BANK USA, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.,and NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff filed a Notice of Withdrawal of Action and Notice of Bankruptcy Filing on January 6, 2014. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

Tro
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark W. Lapham, Esq., Attorney at Law, (925-837-9007), for Rose Marie Harris, Plaintiff and moving party.
Jamie D. Wells, Esq. of ReedSmith LLP, (415-659-4751), for Bank of America and Reconstruct Company, Defendants and opposing parties.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
